summary: Completed E2E testing of IMDB integration feature. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Movie detail modal displays IMDB rating (yellow star), TMDB rating, Metascore badge (color-coded), Box Office (Worldwide/US-Canada), Awards text, and MPA rating badge when IMDB data is available.
passed_tests: Backend: MongoDB movies collection has 32,929 documents with proper indexes
Backend: GET /api/movies/search-tmdb returns local IMDB results with source='local'
Backend: Search results include TMDB poster URLs backfilled
Backend: Search results use TMDB IDs for easy detail lookups
Backend: Search returns year in results
Backend: Search returns empty for non-existent queries (fallback behavior)
Backend: Search requires minimum 2 characters
Backend: GET /api/movies/{id} includes imdb_rating (e.g., Fight Club: 8.8)
Backend: GET /api/movies/{id} includes meta_score (e.g., Fight Club: 67)
Backend: GET /api/movies/{id} includes gross_worldwide (e.g., Fight Club: $101M)
Backend: GET /api/movies/{id} includes gross_us_canada (e.g., Fight Club: $37M)
Backend: GET /api/movies/{id} includes awards text (e.g., Oscar nominations)
Backend: GET /api/movies/{id} includes mpa rating (e.g., 'R')
Backend: Movie detail retains TMDB data (poster, backdrop, trailer, cast, similar)
Backend: Dune Part Two (2024) enrichment verified: IMDB 8.5, Metascore 79, Worldwide $714M, 2 Oscars
Backend: Search to detail flow works correctly
Frontend: Movie detail modal shows IMDB rating with yellow star (9.3 IMDb for Shawshank Redemption)
Frontend: Movie detail modal shows TMDB rating (8.7 TMDB)
Frontend: Movie detail modal shows Metascore badge (82 - green color for >=70)
Frontend: Movie detail modal shows Worldwide gross ($29M)
Frontend: Movie detail modal shows US/Canada gross ($29M)
Frontend: Movie detail modal shows Awards text (Nominated for 7 Oscars, 21 wins & 42 nominations total)
Frontend: Movie detail modal shows MPA rating badge (R)
Frontend: data-testid attributes present for imdb-rating, meta-score, imdb-extra
critical_code_review_comments: MovieDetail.js correctly conditionally renders IMDB enrichment fields only when data available
Metascore badge correctly color-coded: green >=70, yellow >=50, red <50
Search endpoint efficiently queries local MongoDB first, supplements with TMDB for posters
Movie detail endpoint matches by title_lower and year for accurate local data lookup
seed_data_creation: No new seed data needed - used existing 32,929 movies in movies collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: IMDB integration fully tested and working. Key points: 1) 32,929 movies in test_database.movies collection with text index on title, 2) Search endpoint /api/movies/search-tmdb queries local DB first, returns source='local' flag, backfills TMDB posters, 3) Movie detail endpoint /api/movies/{id} enriches with imdb_rating, meta_score, budget, gross_worldwide, gross_us_canada, awards, mpa when movie found in local DB by title_lower + year match, 4) Frontend MovieDetail.js displays all IMDB fields with proper data-testid attributes. Test with movies like The Shawshank Redemption, Fight Club, Dune Part Two which have complete IMDB data.
